# BP-116 positive: Echo writes an error response and returns the raw error.
lang: go
file: BP-116-vulnerable.go
variant: echo
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
)

func create(c echo.Context) error {
	if saveErr := save(); saveErr != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{"error": saveErr.Error()})
		return saveErr
	}
	return c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, map[string]bool{"ok": true})
}

func save() error { return nil }
